chapter_title.en: The Supplication of Qunoot in Witr Prayer

text: 1415 - وَ رَوَى أَبَانُ بْنُ عُثْمَانَ عَنِ اَلْحَلَبِيِّ: أَنَّهُ قَالَ لِأَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أُسَمِّي اَلْأَئِمَّةَ عَلَيهِمُ اَلسَّلاَمُ فِي اَلصَّلاَةِ فَقَالَ «أَجْمِلْهُمْ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1415 - Aban ibn Uthman narrated from Al-Halabi that he said to Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as):
"Shall I mention the names of the Imams (as) during the prayer?"
Imam (as) replied: "Summarize them”.
